description: You are a Maintenance Planner updating Preventive Maintenance (PM) definitions in OpenMaint (http://localhost:8090/cmdbuild/ui/, credentials: admin / admin) following a new safety directive. Read the requirements in /home/ga/Desktop/safety_directive_2026.txt and update the specified PM records with the new descriptions, warnings, and duration times. Ensure only the records identified in the directive are modified to match the safety standards exactly.

metadata.context: Updating standard operating procedures based on new safety regulations.
